evidence: "Not bad, not great. It held my attention for a couple of episodes."
"Pretty good but don't expect to learn anything new."
"This show is not for me. Too much violence without purpose."
"An excellent move. There are already many, many reviews on the web and elsewhere..."
"Excellent acting. A compelling story line. First rate production."
"If you are a Paul Newman fan he very good in the movie."
"The extra disk is also interesting to find out more about how the show was made, the cast and director."
"This is a movie that has stood the test of time. We rented this movie through Amazon Prime and could not stop laughing."
"Give this show a chance and you will be pleasantly surprised how it will hold your interest and make you come back for more."
"This is a good movie for a Christian's library."

summary: The user enjoys drama and mystery genres, particularly those with strong acting and production quality. They have a mixed preference for narrative complexity and pacing, indicating a balance between engaging stories and straightforward storytelling.
